title: Task filters for a person is/is not in a team <select team>

posts.author: stuartsjg (Stuart Graham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We have 4 team leads with their respective team members and we use the same board and rely upon filtering which works well. However, it would be good to be able to filter to show tasks allocated to people whom are in a particular team.

You can filter if the team is in the person column, but we don’t allocate to teams, just to people.

it feels silly to need to create a filter with a manual list of people when their names are already grouped together as a team?
